subject: feat(icons): three-colour Material Symbols signature
body:
Splits the Material glyph at its M/Z sub-path boundaries so each semantic
element renders in its own DaisyUI business token: cursive flourish in
accent, X mark in primary, dotted baseline in secondary, on base-300.
Geometry is preserved byte-for-byte — the split only expands relative
m/t commands to absolute; the cursive loop's inner hole stays carved out
via fill-rule=nonzero winding within the same <path>.

Tags: ui, icons
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
